app.name: Visual Boy Advance GX
app.long_description:
- A port of Visual Boy Advance - M to the Wii - Use of English as the default UI language - Multi-languages support: Japanese, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Korean, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Catalan, Turkish, Swedish
Website: https://github.com/duxiuxing/vbagx-cn
